issue_title: Feature Request: Add --export-format markdown option for chat history exports
issue_body:
### Description
It would be super helpful if Gemini CLI supported exporting chat session histories directly into Markdown format.
Currently, exported session logs are stored as raw JSON under `~/.gemini/tmp/`.

### Proposed Solution
Add a `--export-format <format>` flag (supporting `json` and `markdown`) to `gemini export` so users can easily share readable conversation notes in documentation or GitHub PRs.

### Use Case
This would save time when embedding agent logs into team documentation or pull request descriptions.
notes: Custom handcrafted FEATURE issue created by Chad. Note: Issue IDs 1-99 are custom made by Chad for benchmark testing.
